mapper.sql: select id, audit_point, audit_prospective_point, audit_system_name, audit_system_content, audit_confirmation_findings, audit_model_name_send, audit_model_logic, audit_model_number, create_person, create_time, update_person, update_time, isdel from hpeapm.audit_elements_handover_model

select.where:
and id = like '%'||#{id}||'%' and audit_point like '%' || like '%'||#{auditPoint}||'%' || '%' and audit_prospective_point like '%' || like '%'||#{auditProspectivePoint}||'%' || '%'
and audit_system_name = like '%'||#{auditSystemName}||'%'
and audit_system_content like '%' || like '%'||#{auditSystemContent}||'%' || '%'
and audit_confirmation_findings = like '%'||#{auditConfirmationFindings}||'%'
and audit_model_name_send = like '%'||#{auditModelNameSend}||'%' and audit_model_logic = like '%'||#{auditModelLogic}||'%' and audit_model_number = like '%'||#{auditModelNumber}||'%' and create_person = like '%'||#{createPerson}||'%' and create_time = like '%'||#{createTime}||'%' and update_person = like '%'||#{updatePerson}||'%' and update_time = like '%'||#{updateTime}||'%' and isdel =1

mapper.insert:
insert into hpeapm.audit_elements_handover_model
audit_point, audit_prospective_point, audit_system_name, audit_system_content, audit_confirmation_findings, audit_model_name_send, audit_model_logic, audit_model_number, create_person,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP as create_time, update_person,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP as update_time, isdel,
like '%'||#{auditPoint}||'%', like '%'||#{auditProspectivePoint}||'%', like '%'||#{auditSystemName}||'%', like '%'||#{auditSystemContent}||'%', like '%'||#{auditConfirmationFindings}||'%', like '%'||#{auditModelNameSend}||'%', like '%'||#{auditModelLogic}||'%', like '%'||#{auditModelNumber}||'%', like '%'||#{createPerson}||'%', now(), like '%'||#{updatePerson}||'%', now(), like '%'||#{isdel}||'%',
mapper.update:
UPDATE hpeapm.audit_elements_handover_model
audit_point=like '%'||#{auditPoint}||'%',
audit_prospective_point=like '%'||#{auditProspectivePoint}||'%',
audit_system_name=like '%'||#{auditSystemName}||'%',
audit_system_content=like '%'||#{auditSystemContent}||'%',
audit_confirmation_findings=like '%'||#{auditConfirmationFindings}||'%', audit_model_name_send=like '%'||#{auditModelNameSend}||'%', audit_model_logic=like '%'||#{auditModelLogic}||'%', audit_model_number=like '%'||#{auditModelNumber}||'%', create_person=like '%'||#{createPerson}||'%', create_time=like '%'||#{createTime}||'%', update_person, update_time=like '%'||#{updateTime}||'%', isdel=like '%'||#{isdel}||'%',
where audit_model_number = like '%'||#{auditModelNumber}||'%'
UPDATE hpeapm.audit_elements_handover_model SET isdel=0 where audit_model_number = like '%'||#{auditModelNumber}||'%'
mapper.select: select * from hpeapm.audit_elements_handover_model where audit_model_number = like '%'||#{auditModelNumber}||'%' AND isdel = 1;

WITH filtered_steps AS ( SELECT audit_model_number, dock_people, dock_department, type_of_information, detailed_time, write_time FROM "hpeapm"."audit_elements_operation_steps" WHERE delete_status = '1' AND information_type = '审计模型来源信息'
AND "is_import" = like '%'||#{isImport}||'%'
AND dock_people = like '%'||#{dockPeople}||'%'
AND dock_department LIKE like '%'||#{dockDepartment}||'%'
), filtered_info AS ( SELECT audit_point_name, audit_model_number, audit_model_name, information_sources, audit_point_number, remark, primary_business_process, secondary_business_process, is_online, share_unit, second_model_number FROM "hpeapm"."audit_elements_info" WHERE 1 = 1
AND offline!='1'
AND primary_business_process LIKE '%'||like '%'||#{primaryBusinessProcess}||'%'||'%'
AND secondary_business_process LIKE '%'||like '%'||#{secondaryBusinessProcess}||'%'||'%'
AND information_sources = like '%'||#{informationSources}||'%'
AND audit_point_number LIKE '%'||like '%'||#{auditPointNumber}||'%'||'%'
AND audit_point_name LIKE '%'||like '%'||#{auditPointName}||'%'||'%'
AND audit_model_number LIKE '%'||like '%'||#{auditModelNumber}||'%'||'%'
AND audit_model_name LIKE '%'||like '%'||#{auditModelName}||'%'||'%'
), org_info AS ( SELECT DISTINCT "busiUnitCode" || "orgCode" AS "id", "provinceName" || '-' || "orgName" AS "name" FROM hpmgr."bonc_union_orginfos" WHERE "busiUnitCode" = 'CM000' UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT "busiUnitCode" AS "id", "provinceName" AS "name" FROM hpmgr."bonc_union_orginfos" WHERE "busiUnitCode" != 'CM000' ) SELECT a.auditPointNumber, a.auditPointName, a.auditModelNumber, a.auditModelName, a.dockPeople, a.dockDepartment, a.primaryBusinessProcess, a.secondaryBusinessProcess, a.informationSources, a.isOnline, a.remark, a.typeOfInformation, a.detailedTime, a.write_time, c."name" AS shareUnitName, a.second_model_number, b."ModelName" AS secondModelName FROM ( SELECT b.audit_point_number AS auditPointNumber, b.audit_point_name AS auditPointName, b.audit_model_number AS auditModelNumber, b.audit_model_name AS auditModelName, b.secondary_business_process AS secondaryBusinessProcess, b.primary_business_process AS primaryBusinessProcess, b.information_sources AS informationSources, b.is_online AS isOnline, a.dock_people AS dockPeople, a.dock_department AS dockDepartment, b.remark, a.type_of_information AS typeOfInformation, a.detailed_time AS detailedTime, a.write_time, b.share_unit AS share_unit, b.second_model_number FROM filtered_steps a JOIN filtered_info b ON a.audit_model_number = b.audit_model_number ORDER BY a.detailed_time DESC LIMIT like '%'||#{size}||'%' OFFSET like '%'||#{page}||'%' ) a LEFT JOIN "hpeapm"."xbpj_company_model" b ON a.second_model_number = b."ModelNo" LEFT JOIN org_info c ON a.share_unit = c."id" ORDER BY a.detailedTime DESC

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT _abc.auditModelNumber) as result FROM ( SELECT b.audit_point_number AS auditPointNumber, b.audit_point_name AS auditPointName, b.audit_model_number AS auditModelNumber, b.audit_model_name AS auditModelName, b.secondary_business_process AS secondaryBusinessProcess, b.primary_business_process AS primaryBusinessProcess, b.information_sources AS informationSources, a.dock_people AS dockPeople, a.dock_department AS dockDepartment, b.remark remark FROM ( SELECT audit_model_number, dock_people, dock_department, information_type FROM "hpeapm"."audit_elements_operation_steps" WHERE delete_status = '1' AND information_type ='审计模型来源信息'
AND "is_import" = like '%'||#{isImport}||'%'
AND dock_people = like '%'||#{dockPeople}||'%'
AND dock_department like like '%'||#{dockDepartment}||'%'
) a JOIN ( SELECT audit_point_name, audit_model_number, audit_model_name, information_sources, audit_point_number, remark remark, primary_business_process, secondary_business_process FROM "hpeapm"."audit_elements_info" WHERE 1 = 1
and offline!='1'
AND primary_business_process like '%'||like '%'||#{primaryBusinessProcess}||'%'||'%'
and secondary_business_process like '%'||like '%'||#{secondaryBusinessProcess}||'%'||'%'
and information_sources= like '%'||#{informationSources}||'%'
and audit_point_number like '%'||like '%'||#{auditPointNumber}||'%'||'%'
and audit_point_name like '%'||like '%'||#{auditPointName}||'%'||'%'
and audit_model_number like '%'||like '%'||#{auditModelNumber}||'%'||'%'
and audit_model_name like '%'||like '%'||#{auditModelName}||'%'||'%' escape '|'
) b ON a.audit_model_number = b.audit_model_number ) _abc LEFT JOIN ( SELECT problem_description problemDescription, audit_time auditTime, "audit_involved" auditInvolved, "audit_project" auditProject, audit_model_number, problem_summary problemSummary FROM "hpeapm"."audit_elements_find_database" WHERE isdel = '1' ) ba ON _abc.auditModelNumber = ba.audit_model_number LEFT JOIN ( SELECT audit_point auditPoint, "audit_prospective_point" auditProspectivePoint, "audit_system_name" auditSystemName, "audit_system_content" auditSystemContent, "audit_confirmation_findings" auditConfirmationFindings, "audit_model_name_send" auditModelNameSend, "audit_model_logic" auditModelLogic, audit_model_number FROM "hpeapm"."audit_elements_handover_model" WHERE isdel = '1' ) mo ON ba.audit_model_number = mo.audit_model_number

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT _abc.auditPointNumber AS auditPointNumber, _abc.auditPointName AS auditPointName, _abc.auditModelNumber AS auditModelNumber, _abc.auditModelName AS auditModelName, _abc.dockPeople AS dockPeople, _abc.dockDepartment AS dockDepartment, _abc.primaryBusinessProcess AS primaryBusinessProcess, _abc.secondaryBusinessProcess AS secondaryBusinessProcess, _abc.informationSources AS informationSources, _abc.isOnline AS isOnline, _abc.remark AS remark, _abc.typeOfInformation, _abc.detailedTime, _abc.writeTime, cc."name" shareUnit, bb."ModelName" as secondModelNumber FROM ( SELECT b.audit_point_number AS auditPointNumber, b.audit_point_name AS auditPointName, b.audit_model_number AS auditModelNumber, b.audit_model_name AS auditModelName, b.secondary_business_process AS secondaryBusinessProcess, b.primary_business_process AS primaryBusinessProcess, b.information_sources AS informationSources, b.is_online AS isOnline, a.dock_people AS dockPeople, a.dock_department AS dockDepartment, b.remark remark, a.type_of_information as typeOfInformation, a.detailed_time detailedTime, a.write_time as writeTime, b.share_unit share_unit, b.second_model_number FROM ( SELECT audit_model_number, dock_people, dock_department, information_type, type_of_information, detailed_time, write_time FROM hpeapm.audit_elements_operation_steps WHERE delete_status = '1' AND information_type ='审计模型来源信息'
AND "is_import" = like '%'||#{isImport}||'%'
AND dock_people = like '%'||#{dockPeople}||'%'
AND dock_department LIKE like '%'||#{dockDepartment}||'%'
) a JOIN ( SELECT audit_point_name, audit_model_number, audit_model_name, information_sources, audit_point_number, remark remark, primary_business_process, secondary_business_process, is_online, share_unit, second_model_number FROM hpeapm."audit_elements_info" WHERE 1 = 1
and offline!='1'
AND primary_business_process like '%' || like '%'||#{primaryBusinessProcess}||'%' || '%'
and secondary_business_process like '%' || like '%'||#{secondaryBusinessProcess}||'%' || '%'
and information_sources= like '%'||#{informationSources}||'%'
and audit_point_number like '%'||#{}||'%',like '%'||#{auditPointNumber}||'%',like '%'||#{}||'%'
and audit_point_name like '%'||#{}||'%',like '%'||#{auditPointName}||'%',like '%'||#{}||'%'
and audit_model_number like '%'||#{}||'%',like '%'||#{auditModelNumber}||'%',like '%'||#{}||'%'
and audit_model_name like '%'||#{}||'%',like '%'||#{auditModelName}||'%',like '%'||#{}||'%'
and information_sources= like '%'||#{informationSources}||'%'
) b ON a.audit_model_number = b.audit_model_number ORDER BY detailedTime DESC ) _abc LEFT JOIN hpeapm."xbpj_company_model" bb ON _abc.second_model_number = bb."ModelNo" LEFT JOIN ( (SELECT DISTINCT (busiUnitCode, orgCode) AS id, (provinceName, '-', orgName) AS "name" FROM hpmgr."bonc_union_orginfos" WHERE "busiUnitCode" = 'CM000') UNION ALL (SELECT DISTINCT "busiUnitCode" AS id, "provinceName" AS "name" FROM hpmgr."bonc_union_orginfos" WHERE "busiUnitCode" != 'CM000' ORDER BY "busiUnitCode") ) cc ON _abc.share_unit = cc."id" ) a ORDER BY a.detailedTime DESC
mapper.insert:
insert into hpeapm.audit_elements_handover_model( id, audit_point, audit_prospective_point,audit_system_name, audit_system_content,audit_confirmation_findings, audit_model_name_send,audit_model_logic, audit_model_number, create_person,create_time,update_person,update_time,isdel) values
( like '%'||#{auditHandoverModel.id}||'%', like '%'||#{auditHandoverModel.auditPoint}||'%', like '%'||#{auditHandoverModel.auditProspectivePoint}||'%', like '%'||#{auditHandoverModel.auditSystemName}||'%', like '%'||#{auditHandoverModel.auditSystemContent}||'%', like '%'||#{auditHandoverModel.auditConfirmationFindings}||'%', like '%'||#{auditHandoverModel.auditModelNameSend}||'%', like '%'||#{auditHandoverModel.auditModelLogic}||'%', like '%'||#{auditHandoverModel.auditModelNumber}||'%', like '%'||#{auditHandoverModel.createPerson}||'%', now(), like '%'||#{auditHandoverModel.updatePerson}||'%', now(), 1)
mapper.select: (SELECT DISTINCT (busiUnitCode, orgCode) AS id, (provinceName, '-', orgName) AS "name" FROM hpmgr."bonc_union_orginfos" WHERE "busiUnitCode" = 'CM000' ) UNION ALL (SELECT DISTINCT "busiUnitCode" AS id, "provinceName" AS "name" FROM hpmgr."bonc_union_orginfos" WHERE "busiUnitCode" != 'CM000' ORDER BY "busiUnitCode")

SELECT aa.ModelNo AS id, aa.ModelName AS "name" FROM hpeapm."xbpj_company_model" aa WHERE aa."modeling_dept" = like '%'||#{prvdId}||'%'
AND AA."org_code" = like '%'||#{orgCode}||'%'
AND AA."ModelNo" = like '%'||#{secondModelNumber}||'%'
AND AA."ModelName" = like '%'||#{secondModelName}||'%'
ORDER BY aa."model_online_time" DESC,id
